steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage opens with though, signaling a contrast: the game was originally distributed one way and is now "readily available." The blank must be the opposite of openly available — something covert, fitting a political protest against an authoritarian regime.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'surreptitiously': means secretly or stealthily — exactly how protest materials would circulate under authoritarian rule. ✓
  • Choice B — 'disingenuously': means insincerely or with hidden motives. The game's distribution was covert, not insincere. ✗
  • Choice C — 'succinctly': means briefly or concisely. This describes communication style, not manner of distribution. ✗
  • Choice D — 'dispassionately': means without emotion or bias. A political protest game would not be distributed emotionlessly, and the word doesn't fit the contrast. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
